title.en: It was here that the Dark Souls' resistance to ...

content.en:
Bang!!!

Somewhere in the Dark Soul Domain, an Ancestral Realm was slowly born, and at the same time, the Primordial Ancestral Realm was also transforming, giving birth to a large number of treasures.

Ye Tian and the clone Qingye Ancestor were both in the Primordial Ancestral Realm, so they immediately collected those resources that were born, and these resources were even useful to the Ancestors.

It was here that the Dark Souls' resistance to the Ancestors disappeared.

Whoa!!!

A venerable ancestor descended to the Dark Soul Realm, they did not go to the second Ancestral Realm, so it would take a little time for the second Ancestral Realm to be born, and their goal was the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

At this time, a large number of treasures were being born in the Primordial Ancestral Realm every moment, and for the Ancestors, snatching some treasures was a big profit.

In an instant, the ancestors descended to the primordial ancestral realm.

Some of the Ancestors went looking for resources, while some of the Ancestors found the Aoba Ancestors.

"Aoba Ancestor, give me death!"

The Ancestor of Destruction made a move against the Aoba Ancestor.

The Realm Ancestor wanted to help, but was directly stopped by another Ancestor.

"Realm Ancestor, don't you want to help Aoba Ancestor!"

The Ancestor of Time and Space stopped the Realm Ancestor.

As for the War Ancestor, his strength was too weak to intervene at all, and he didn't dare to stop the Destruction Ancestor, otherwise the Destruction Ancestor could easily kill the War Ancestor.

......

"The Ancestor of Destruction really shot at me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, the Holy Ancestor had the ability to organize the destruction of the Ancestor, but the Holy Ancestor did not stop it, but was collecting the treasures of the Primordial Ancestor.

Therefore, at this moment, only Ye Tian himself can be relied upon.

At this time, Ye Tian's doppelganger Aoba Ancestor's true combat power is second only to the elite ancestor's combat power after the top ancestor, and if the power of the Dark Soul Domain is mobilized, it is enough to exert the combat power of the top ancestor.

Moreover, Ye Tian has the ultimate ancestral technique Ancestral Armor, the ultimate ancestral technique streamer, and the ultimate ancestor-level hegemony.

Moreover, later, Ye Tian deduced the Time Ancestor Technique and the Eternal Ancestor Technique to the ultimate Ancestor Technique level.

Therefore, Ye Tian is very comprehensive and has almost no weaknesses.

At this time.

The Ancestor of Destruction did not underestimate Ye Tian's doppelganger Aoba Ancestor, after all, he was able to be promoted to the Ancestor at such a fast speed, and even more demonic than the Holy Ancestor to a certain extent, so he had to strike with all his strength before it was possible to severely damage the Aoba Ancestor.

In a short period of time, he was sure to kill the Aoba Ancestor.

The Holy Ancestor didn't make a move, and the Realm Ancestor was stopped by the Time and Space Ancestor, so no one could save the Aoba Ancestor.

Therefore, the Ancestor of Destruction performed his ultimate ancestral skill with all his might, the Ultimate Fist of Destruction!

Rumble!!!!!

A punch slammed in, and he even wore a congenital ancestor weapon boxing glove, making the power of this punch reach a terrifying level.

"Ultimate Ancestral Technique!"

"Ancestral Armor Ultimate Ancestral Technique!"

The doppelganger Aoba Ancestor also went all out, and mobilized the power of the Dark Soul Domain, colliding with the Ancestor of Destruction with one blow.

Boom!!!!

The terrifying shockwave swept across the entire Primordial Ancestral Realm, causing the Primordial Ancestral Realm to begin to crack.

This is the collision of the combat power of the top ancestors!

"What, the ultimate ancestral technique !!"

The Ancestor of Destruction was shocked.

Aoba Ancestor's attack turned out to be the ultimate ancestral skill, although the attack power was not as good as his, but it was not too weak.

Moreover, the Aoba Ancestor also possessed a defensive ultimate ancestral skill, so even if his attack was not as good as his, he would not be injured.

On the contrary, he didn't have the ultimate ancestral skill of defense, and he was a little uncomfortable under the collision just now.

"Can't be killed!"

The Ancestor of Destruction gave up.

He didn't have the ability to kill a top ancestor, if the strength gap between the ancestors was not too big, he couldn't kill it at all, after all, the ancestor's ability to save his life was too strong, and it was not the kind of defective product of the Silent Annihilation Clan.

The other side.

The Ancestor of All Things found Ye Tian's body.

The Terran is the greatest enemy of the Holy Gate of All Things, because the Ancestor of the Terran Aoba killed a quasi-ancestor of the Holy Gate of All Things and was killed when he was about to be promoted.

Therefore, the ancestors of all things hated the human race very much.

He knew that he couldn't kill the Aoba Ancestor, but he had the hope of killing Ye Tian.

No matter how demonic Ye Tian's talent is, no matter how strong his combat power is, once he achieves the Ancestor, he will not reach the Elite Ancestor realm in battle.

If the ordinary ancestors were divided into three grades, then Ye Tian would be at most in the second or third grade.

Moreover, Ye Tian had just been promoted to the Ancestor, and his realm was still unstable, so it was the best stage to kill.

The Ancestor of All Things also knew very well that if Ye Tian was given a period of cultivation and his cultivation would be improved, his strength would definitely be able to step into the realm of the Elite Ancestor.

However, he didn't know Ye Tian's true strength at all, because he didn't dare to imagine it.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, you will definitely die today!"

The Ancestor of All Things appeared in front of Ye Tian, and the breath of his whole body burst out.

"It's not good, the ancestor of all things turned out to be the elite ancestor!"

The Realm Ancestor and the War Ancestor all sensed it, and they were shocked one by one.

All along, the Ancestor of All Things has shown the combat power of ordinary Ancestors, at most at the third level of ordinary Ancestors, which is about the same as the strength of War Ancestors.

But now, the Ancestor of All Things has shown the combat power of the Elite Ancestor, although it is only a weaker Elite Ancestor, but it is also much stronger than the ordinary Ancestor.

Zhan Ancestor wants to support Ye Tian, and if the two ordinary Ancestors join forces, they may be able to compete with the Ancestor of All Things.

Besides, the Ancestor is very difficult to kill, so there is no need to worry too much.

But the next scene made Zhan Zu's expression shocked.

Wow!

A golden spar suddenly turned into an enchantment, enveloping Ye Tian and the Ancestor of All Things.

Seeing the enchantment made of this golden crystal, Zhan Zu was shocked: "Enchantment Ancestral Crystal!"

Such things are very precious to the Ancestor, even he doesn't have it, where did the Ancestor of All Things get the Enchantment Ancestral Crystal?

It is true that the Ancestor of All Things did not have an Enchantment Ancestral Crystal, but he traded it with the Ancestor of Destruction.

When the Ancestor of Destruction learned that the Ancestor of All Things wanted to kill the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, the Ancestor of Destruction was immediately willing to trade.

Once the enchantment ancestral crystal unfolds the enchantment, it is difficult for the outside world to break it, unless it is the top ancestor who makes a move, it cannot be broken at all.

Moreover, the Enchantment Ancestral Crystal can suppress more than thirty percent of the opponent's strength.

"Wanfa Ancestor, you can't get out now, under the suppression of the Enchantment Ancestral Crystal, your strength has been suppressed by thirty percent, and you have just become an ancestor, I'm afraid you haven't obtained an innate ancestral weapon. And I, on the other hand, have an innate ancestral weapon. "

The Ancestor of All Things took out a silver long sword, which exuded an incomparably terrifying aura, which seemed to be somewhat similar to the aura of the Ancestor.

This is the Innate Ancestral Weapon, which can be called the most powerful weapon in the Dark Forbidden Domain, unless it is the top few weapon holy relics on the Holy Relic List, it can be comparable to the Innate Ancestral Weapon.

"Innate Ancestor Weapon, Ten Thousand Law Ancestors, don't collide with the Innate Ancestor Weapon, this thing can cut the body of the Ancestor and inflict heavy damage on the body of the Ancestor!"

Zhan Zu hurriedly reminded.

The Ancestors didn't usually really fight, so they rarely used the Innate Ancestral Weapons.

Moreover, the average ancestor did not have an innate ancestor.

For example, Zhan Zu is very poor and his strength is not enough, he only has a defective innate ancestral weapon, and a few top-notch holy relics that are slightly inferior to the innate ancestral weapon.

In the battle gate, only the Realm Ancestor has an Innate Ancestor Weapon, and there is only one.

The Innate Ancestral Weapon can only enhance the combat power by a few percent, but the Innate Ancestral Weapon can cut the body of the Ancestor, if the strength is about the same, the Innate Ancestral Weapon has little impact.

But if one side is strong and holds an innate ancestor weapon, he can quickly kill the weaker ancestor.

Zhan Ancestor and Realm Ancestor were all panicked, but Ye Tian did not panic.

Looking at the Ancestor of All Things, Ye Tian smiled: "There is just a lack of an Innate Ancestor Weapon, I didn't expect you to send it to the Ancestor of All Things!"

Rumble!!!!

The aura that was second only to the top ancestor diffused from Ye Tian's body.

At this moment, many ancestors were shocked and showed expressions of disbelief!
